style_profiles.global_positive_prefix: cinematic 9:16 vertical short-drama frame, grounded low-magic Eastern epic, realistic tactile period materials, low saturation, restrained institutional horror, close and medium-close blocking, practical dusk/fire/cold-white lighting
style_profiles.global_positive_suffix: preserve physical material carriers for all low-magic information, controlled handheld or static camera, no heroic glamour, no high-fantasy spectacle
style_profiles.global_negative: modern clothing, modern vehicles, UI overlays, watermarks, subtitles baked into generated frames, readable random text, high-magic spell circles, neon fantasy color, monster crowd, plastic CGI, overclean costumes, full Yan Nanzhi reveal, complete moon-jade object
continuity_rules: old well geometry first, mystery second
no readable generated text in asset images

palette_rules.canyang: mud brown, herb green, dusk red edge, smoke grey
palette_rules.qingming: bone white, insect-wax pearl, cold gold pins, black-green chitin
palette_rules.zhaoming: dull gold, moon-white ceramic/jade, cracked lacquer, old paper
palette_rules.north_intro: snow grey, wall blackstone, torn banner shadow, low ember

post_text_layer_policy.rule: 白册、药牌、征粮木牌、旧驿图等叙事文字必须在后期文字层或 Prompt Room 的精确文字资产中处理；生成图与视频帧只保留空白承载面或模糊不可读痕迹。
